passage_text: As used in this article, unless the context otherwise requires: (3) 'Deployer' means any person doing business in this state that deploys a high-risk artificial intelligence system. 'Deployer' does not include a person who deploys a high-risk artificial intelligence system for the person's own personal use.

definition.definition_text: any person doing business in this state that deploys a high-risk artificial intelligence system

threshold_exception.threshold_condition: person doing business in this state

exceptions.description: A person who deploys a high-risk artificial intelligence system for the person's own personal use
